summary: No runtime auto-update on node_lock commit bump: existing installs keep old node commit silently (both engines, folder-exists check only). MPI-117 is build-time pin not runtime updater; nodeset_version has 0 consumers; no stored installed-commit to diff. Surfaced by MPI-221.

Design finalized w/ user. Constraint: NO engine wipe for a node bump (MpiNodes bumps ~every release) -> per-node versioning required. Fix = extend existing boot-repair ladder: (1) .mpi_node_commit marker at install, (2) drift check in /engine/deps-status + remote connect-edge, (3) targeted reinstall via existing repair-deps (local) / remoteInstallDep force (remote), no engine touch. AUTO-APPLY via existing 'repairing' modal (same UX as comfy upgrade). Both engines (remote twin heals differently - don't forget). Enabler: move 3 non-engine nodes to installOnEngine (all no-reqs or already pinned) + enforce installRequirements=>pipPins. Verified hooks: shell.js _bootApp L235-263, engine.js repair-deps L560.
